name: node-picocolors
title: node-picocolors
summary: library for terminal output formatting with colors (Node.js module)
description:
library for terminal output formatting with colors (Node.js module)
This package provides an extremely tiny and fast library
for terminal output formatting using ANSI colors.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-picocolors because library for terminal output formatting with colors (Node.js module).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-picocolors as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-picocolors with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-picocolors --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
